name: xhs-clean-extension
description: Automatically detect, hide, and help remove toxic comments on Xiaohongshu (RED).
author: Glimmer

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' http://localhost:*; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* ws://localhost:* https://open.bigmodel.cn https://api.deepseek.com https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com https://api.moonshot.cn;
